name: @smithers-orchestrator/jj-darwin-arm64
description: Vendored jj (Jujutsu) binary for darwin-arm64, used by @smithers-orchestrator/vcs. Installed automatically as an optional dependency; not meant to be depended on directly.

scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "if(!require('fs').existsSync(__dirname+'/bin/jj'))throw new Error('jj missing — run pnpm fetch:jj before releasing')"
